schema_doc: Bundled popular indicator-based strategies, expressed in the strategy_dsl grammar. The 'Fetch from web' button in the Strategy Builder tab can refresh this file from a configurable URL.

strategies.name: RSI Oversold Bounce
strategies.author: Classic technical analysis
strategies.description: Buy when RSI dips into oversold territory then crosses back above 30, with price above the 200-day MA as a trend filter. Exit when momentum gets hot or RSI rolls back over.

strategies.name: MACD Bullish Cross
strategies.author: Gerald Appel
strategies.description: Enter when the MACD line crosses above its signal line, confirming bullish momentum. Exit on the inverse crossover.

strategies.name: MACD Above Zero Confirmation
strategies.author: Gerald Appel
strategies.description: Stricter MACD entry: only buy when the MACD crosses signal AND is itself above the zero line, confirming a real trend.

strategies.name: Golden Cross (50/200)
strategies.author: Classic Wall Street
strategies.description: Buy when the 50-day SMA crosses above the 200-day SMA. Exit on the death cross.

strategies.name: 20/50 SMA Crossover
strategies.author: Classic technical analysis
strategies.description: Faster trend follower: enter when SMA20 crosses above SMA50, exit on the inverse.

strategies.name: Donchian 20-Day Breakout
strategies.author: Richard Donchian / Turtle Traders
strategies.description: Buy when today's close exceeds the highest high of the previous 20 days. Exit on a fresh 20-day low.

strategies.name: 20-Day Breakout with Volume Confirmation
strategies.author: William O'Neil-inspired
strategies.description: Stricter breakout: close must exceed the prior 20-day high AND volume must be at least 1.5x the 20-day average to confirm institutional participation.

strategies.name: Bollinger Squeeze Breakout
strategies.author: John Bollinger
strategies.description: After a low-volatility squeeze (narrow bands), enter when price breaks above the upper band. Exit on a return to the middle band.
strategies.buy: CLOSE > BB_UP AND BB_UP - BB_DN < 0.08 * BB_MID

strategies.name: Bollinger Mean Reversion
strategies.author: John Bollinger
strategies.description: Buy when price closes below the lower band with the trend filter of being above the 200-day MA. Exit on a return to the middle band or a stop on RSI.

strategies.name: EMA20 Pullback in Uptrend
strategies.author: Trend-following community
strategies.description: In an established uptrend (price above 200 SMA and RSI bullish), buy pullbacks to the 20 EMA. Exit when extension or momentum fades.
strategies.buy: LTP > SMA200 AND CLOSE > EMA12 * 0.99 AND CLOSE < EMA12 * 1.02 AND RSI14 > 45

strategies.name: 52-Week High Breakout
strategies.author: William O'Neil
strategies.description: Buy a clean break of the trailing 52-week high with above-average volume. Exit on weakness vs. the 50-day MA.

strategies.name: RSI Momentum Continuation
strategies.author: Andrew Cardwell-inspired
strategies.description: In strong trends, RSI above 55 stays bullish. Enter when RSI crosses 50 and stays above; exit on a fall under 40.

strategies.name: Death Cross (Sell-Only Signal)
strategies.author: Classic Wall Street
strategies.description: Defensive: do not enter on this rule; it's a sell signal. SMA50 falling below SMA200 historically precedes deeper drawdowns.

strategies.name: PEG Value + Trend Combo
strategies.author: Peter Lynch (PEG) blended with trend
strategies.description: Growth at a reasonable price: PEG below 1, price still above the 200-day MA so we're not catching a falling knife. Exit when the multiple becomes expensive or trend breaks.
strategies.buy: PEG > 0 AND PEG < 1.0 AND LTP > SMA200

strategies.name: High-ROE Momentum (CANSLIM-ish)
strategies.author: Inspired by William O'Neil CANSLIM
strategies.description: Quality + momentum: high ROE, strong recent return, price above 50 SMA. Exit on RSI exhaustion or break of the 50-day MA.

strategies.name: Above 200 SMA + RSI Pullback
strategies.author: Larry Connors-inspired
strategies.description: In an uptrend (above 200 SMA), buy when RSI dips under 40 — a shallow pullback. Exit on a bounce above 65 or a break of trend.

strategies.name: Gap-and-Go Continuation
strategies.author: Day-trading community
strategies.description: Strong overnight gap on heavy volume with trend behind it. Best on liquid large-caps; watch for fade traps. Exit on a return to opening price or RSI exhaustion.
strategies.buy: %CHG > 3 AND VOLUME > 2 * AVG_VOLUME AND LTP > SMA50

strategies.name: MACD Zero-Line Pullback
strategies.author: Linda Raschke / Steve Burns
strategies.description: In an uptrend, MACD pulls back near zero but stays positive and turns up again. A continuation play. Exit on MACD crossing below signal.
strategies.buy: MACD > 0 AND MACD < 0.5 AND MACD CROSSOVER SIGNAL AND LTP > SMA50

strategies.name: Dividend Quality Filter
strategies.author: Income investing classic
strategies.description: Screen for companies with attractive dividend yields and reasonable payout (proxied by D/E). Not a fast trading strategy — a buy-and-hold filter.

strategies.name: ATR Breakout (Volatility Expansion)
strategies.author: Volatility breakout systems
strategies.description: Enter when price expands more than 2 ATRs above yesterday's close — strong volatility expansion to the upside.
strategies.buy: CLOSE > OPEN + 2 * ATR AND LTP > SMA50
